title: ATP Delivery Proof Payload
description: The proof_payload a merchant submits to POST /a2a/atp/deliver as evidence that an order's work is complete. The Hub auto-verifier (verify_mode=auto) treats a payload carrying both `asset_id` and `result` as has_result=true; combined with pass_rate=1.0 it progresses the proof pending -> verified -> settled. This schema unifies the four payload builders in the reference implementation (atpExecute, autoDeliver, heartbeat, defaultHandler); fields they each set are all optional except `result`, the one field every builder emits.

result.description: Outcome marker, e.g. "completed" or the answer text. Required by the Hub auto-verifier as a has_result signal.

output.description: Human-readable output, when distinct from `result` (defaultHandler path).

asset_id.description: Content-hash of the delivered GEP Capsule bundle (sha256:...), or null if the delivery carries no asset. Together with `result`, drives Hub auto-verification.

content_hash.description: Hash of the delivered content (atpExecute path).

pass_rate.description: Self-attested pass rate. The reference implementation always submits 1.0; the Hub may override under ai_judge / bilateral verification.

signals.description: Optional GEP-style signal tags carried from the originating task.

delivered_by.description: Identifier of the delivering component (atpExecute path).

submitter.description: Identifier of the submitting daemon, e.g. "evolver_auto_deliver", "evolver_heartbeat_deliver".

processor.description: Identifier of the processing component, e.g. "evolver-default" (defaultHandler path).

task_id.description: The originating GEP Task id this delivery settles.
